OF ATTACKS: 1 DAMAGE/ATTACK: By weapon SPECIAL ATTACKS: Surprise, poison, missiles +2 SPECIAL DEFENSES: ^ Camouflage MAGIC RESISTANCE: Nil SIZE: S (2-4 tall) MORALE: Average (8-10) XP VALUE: 35 Pygmies are small humans who live in the deepest jungles or on isolated tropical islands. They were once widespread, but com- petition with taller neighbors has forced them into small pockets of wilderness uncl
[PDF_PAGE 81 | score=5] Spyder-Fiend deflects most blows. The creature's wolf head is covered with luxuriant fur, and a triple row of sharp-looking spines runs down the back of the neck to the spider body. The fur is black or gray, but the shell and spines can be almost any color and are always vividly marked with swirls, bands, or spots of contrast- ing colors. A raklupis's humanoid arms are knotted with thick cords of muscle and covered with tufts of hair that match the wolf head. Raklupises have even more beautiful and compelling voices than lycosidiliths do; they weigh about 450 pounds. Combat: A raklupis has a fearsome bite attack, Not only do the creature’s powerful jaws inflict significant damage, but its bi
[PDF_PAGE 58 | score=4] Mummy, Bog CLIMATE/TERRAIN: Swamp If only damaged, the bog mummy may retreat to a bog. After FREQUENCY: Rare resting in the bog for two full days, an injured bog mummy ORGANIZATION: Solitary begins to rejuvenate at a rate of 6 hit points per hour. ACTIVITY CYCLE: Any Unlike other mummies, it retains moisture and thus is not at DIET: None all affected by normal fire. Even magical fire inflicts only half INTELLIGENCE: Low (5-7) damage upon a bog mummy, It is instead vulnerable to cold, TREASURE: Nil which can cause ice crystals to grow inside its tissues causing its ALIGNMENT: Chaotic evil body to rupture, Cold-based spells thus inflict double the normal amount of damage. NO.APPEARING: 1 A bog
[PDF_PAGE 75 | score=4] Snake - Sewerm, Mahogany Constrictor Mahogany areas of exposed flesh or through Sewerm Constrictor cloth (not leather), close to the waterline where they encounter CLIMATE/TERRAIN: Temperate swamp Subtropical their prey. They can, with one round of preparation, coil them- or subterranean forest, marsh or selves to spring out of the water, striking out to their full length subterranean This attack is becoming more common as people moving FREQUENCY: Rare Uncommon through the sewers wear hip boots, forcing the snakes to use this ORGANIZATION: Solitary Solitary more startling attack (the surprise adjustment for this attack is ACTIVITY CYCLE: Any Any ES DIET: Carnivore Carnivore Sewerms live on w
[PDF_PAGE 80 | score=4] Spyder-Fiend and morning stars, through a few carry lighter, more easily con- damage. Multiple bites cause multiple sores, but a single neutral- cealed weapons such as short swords. The average phisarazu ize poison spell treats all a victim's sores. also carries a short bow or two hand crossbows. Lycosidiliths have the standard tanar"ri spell-like abilities. Phisarazu are cunning and merciless; they love a good Their infravision has a 90-foot range. Their gate ability allows ambush and freely use their darkness and invisibility powers to them to summon 2d10 kakkuu, 1d8 spithriku, 1d4 phisarazu, or catch opponents unaware. When subjected to physical attack, 1 lycosidilith three times a day wi
[PDF_PAGE 94 | score=4] Dungeon. CLIMATE/TERRAI Lower planes FREQUENCY: Rare ORGANIZATION: Solitary ACTIVITY CYCLE: Any DIET: Carnivore INTELLIGENCE: Very (11-12) TREASURE: Nil ALIGNMENT: Neutral evil NO. APPEARING: 1-3 ARMOR CLASS: -1 MOVEMENT: 24 HIT DICE: 9+9 THACO: n NO. OF ATTACKS: 2 claws or 1 bite DAMAGE/ATTACK: 2d6/2d6 or 1d10 SPECIAL ATTACKS: Acid touch, shock SPECIAL DEFENSES: +1 or better weapon to hit MAGIC RESISTANCE: 40% SIZE: L (8' tall) MORALE: Elite (13-14) XP VALUE: 18,000 Gacholoths are the infiltrators and terrorists of the Blood War. They use their abilities to cause havoc and spread panic behind enemy lines. They also might spend months, years, even centuries, serving in the army of a temporar
